resources.string: Triggered after the call is screened.
In a meeting right now, will catch you later.
Can\'t talk now, will hit you up later.
Generates the auto-reply text based on the call screening result.

Send an SMS message.

Number
Checks multiple sources in order, adopts the first match found:
  Tag send_sms_to (can be created using Set Tag)
  The incoming number

SMS Content
Checks in order:
  Tag send_sms_content
  Text output from the previous step

Use this regex to exclude specific numbers, such as landlines or international numbers.

For example
  \\d{10,11}
  10 to 11-digit numbers.

Automatically send an SMS to contacts when their calls are blocked.
Different messages can be set for Meeting Mode and other blocking features.
